summary: P1.8-10 B2.3/B2.4: estimated-segment CSS glow with reduced-motion opt-out, min-h-11 whole-tile and bar touch targets, focus-visible rings preserved; #229 keyboard expand→CTA path unchanged.

interfaceChanges.description: Adds estimated-segment-glow class, data-estimated-glow attribute, and min-h-11 touch-target wrapper.

mappings.criterion: Estimated segment has glow animation class
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue230_estimated_glow_tile_targets.test.tsx::applies glow class on estimated segment when motion is allowed

mappings.criterion: prefers-reduced-motion: reduce disables glow and pulse
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue230_estimated_glow_tile_targets.test.tsx::disables glow class when prefers-reduced-motion is reduce

mappings.criterion: Metric tile bounding box height ≥ 44px at 375px viewport
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue230_estimated_glow_tile_targets.test.tsx::metric tile has min-h-11 for 44px touch target at mobile viewport

mappings.criterion: Keyboard path from #229 remains functional after target expansion
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue230_estimated_glow_tile_targets.test.tsx::keyboard: Enter toggles expand and Tab reaches Decisions CTA after target expansion

mappings.criterion: No layout shift when glow animates on
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue230_estimated_glow_tile_targets.test.tsx::keeps bar track height stable while glow animates on touch wrapper
